headline: Lam Research (LRCX) Stock Slides As AI Memory Boom Loses Steam
summary: AI focused memory and chip stocks, including Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX), have come under pressure as the recent boom in demand shows signs of cooling. Shares across the semiconductor sector weakened after SK hynix stumbled and investors reassessed expectations for AI related returns. Reports point to cautious capital spending, slower memory demand and export regulation uncertainty weighing on Lam Research and its peers. Lam Research sits at the center of the semiconductor equipment supply...
